releaseImpact.cloudFunctions: No runtime code change; formal release deploys only run-scoped immutable snapshots, selectively deploys fresh mismatches, and verifies all planned functions.
releaseImpact.adminWeb: No runtime code change; formal release deploys only the pinned snapshot unless the exact Aliyun current publication identity attests.
releaseImpact.miniprogram: No runtime code change; formal release may reuse only an exact identity derived from the fresh normalized actual upload receipt.
